---
title: "til"
date: '2025-08-27'
categories: [project, tools, writing]
github_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/til"
project_url: "https://lawwu.github.io/til/"
image: "https://opengraph.github.com/repo/lawwu/til"
stars: 1
project_lang: "JavaScript"
---

"Today I Learned" — a running log of small things I've picked up across programming, data science, and tools. Inspired by Simon Willison's TIL format.

[Browse TILs →](https://lawwu.github.io/til/) · [View on GitHub →](https://github.com/lawwu/til)
